g.text: All-in-one platform for home decor makers & interior designers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Wreath Design Studio feature')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about supply and inventory tracking for wreath makers')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the moodboard and room visualization feature')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about client management features for interior designers')
sendPrompt('How does the marketplace storefront work in WreathStudio Pro?')
sendPrompt('What AI features does WreathStudio Pro offer?')
sendPrompt('How does booking and invoicing work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the analytics and reporting tools')
sendPrompt('Describe the subscription tier pricing model')
sendPrompt('How does the transaction fee model work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the supplier marketplace affiliate model')
sendPrompt('What is the white-label offering for interior designers?')
sendPrompt('How do AI add-on credits work?')
